user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I just wanted to follow up on your recent support ticket to make sure everything is still working as expected.

If the issue has come back or you’re running into anything else, just reply here and we’ll be happy to help.

Thanks,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the instructions to draft a follow-up message and adhered to the personality and communication guidelines established in its system prompt.
